title: Retrowave Sun & Moon
description: The pack will give the sun and moon a bright thematic texture, which refers to the "retrowave" style that appeared in the 2000s and absorbed the aesthetics of the 80s with the addition of new technologies.
body:
The pack will give the sun and moon a bright thematic texture, which refers to the "retrowave" style that appeared in the 2000s and absorbed the aesthetics of the 80s with the addition of new technologies.

![Retrowave Sun & Moon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42b0443d84d3846de6115db8bcc3cd8850392458.png)
